headline: Iran’s Ceasefire Sends Energy Lower. Why Oil Services Stocks Are Holding Up.
summary: Companies like SLB and Baker Hughes should benefit from postconflict repairs to oil infrastructure and increased output.

headline: Baker Hughes to deliver compression units for gas pipeline in Argentina
summary: The order also covers the provision of commissioning services, spare parts, specialist tools, and remote monitoring and diagnostic capabilities.
